---
title: 'Walking With God | 11/25/14'
date: '2014-11-25T20:06:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7698950957518558642'
blogger_filename: '/2014/11/walking-with-god-112514.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="MsoPlainText" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia;">Do you want to do this another Ten Years? No. Good, neither do I. Focus on your craft and calling.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<br />
<div class="MsoPlainText" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia;">Ideas. Abstracts. Possibilities. These are your playground.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<br />
Poke a stick into an Ant Hill. Watch them swarm. How does one know to go right when another goes left or up? Hive Mind. The basis of an alien colony. Each sends and received pings that tell of locations, size, dimension, material, usefullness, threat, and then a plan is corporately developed to attack, use, deconstruct, reapir. Etc. <br />
